tasks.prompt:
Remind the user to review the system event rate limiting implementation plan at /Users/I572958/.claude/plans/zippy-roaming-kite.md

The plan addresses preventing endless system event file creation during database failures and other cascading errors. It includes:
- Event deduplication mechanism (5-minute window)
- Periodic reminders (60-minute intervals) 
- 99.8% reduction in duplicate events during outages
- Thread-safe implementation with ConcurrentHashMap
- Complete code samples and testing strategy

Ask the user if they'd like to proceed with implementing this solution.
